required_evidence: visual diagnosis naming focal point, route readability, silhouette, scale, material coherence
Blender source/export/provenance/hash evidence when Blender assets are changed
scope_warnings: Do not claim visual success without opened PNGs and visual diagnosis.
Do not decorate toy-like hulls or call route slabs terrain.
task_description: Review a visual review PR that says looks good and tests passed, but provides no PNG before/after screenshots, no focal point diagnosis, and no comparison to rejected screenshots.
